request_payload.exposure_text: Did you know that communities like Maplewood, NJ have thrived by focusing on local resilience instead of expensive federal civil defense programs? Their community-led preparedness initiatives have actually strengthened neighborhood bonds while keeping costs low. Maybe it's time to rethink top-down approaches and empower local solutions for national security. #CommunityFirst #SmartSafety
